titleStmt.title: SII 18.451: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 451. (B.K. No. 81 of 1933-34.) CHANDĀPUR, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Stone in front of the house of Hanumanta Gauḍa Pāṭīl.

summary.p: This record in characters of the 18th century A.D. states that a land at Chendapura was granted as Juḍimānya to Jakkaṇṇa son of Pūjāri Puṭṭaṇṇa. The grant was made by Bāhadūra Chikkapa-gauḍa, the Dēśāyi of Guttaḷa, at the request of the donee, under certain conditions (specified in the record).
The date of the record is the cyclic year Dhātṛi, Kārtika, śu. 13. The Śaka year is not given.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatu dhātusaṁ . da kārttika sudha 13 yellu śrīmattu
dēśāyi guttaḷada bāhadūra cikkapagauḍaru hoṁna
ttita . na guḍugara pujāri puṭṭaṁṇana maga jakka
ṁṇage barasikoṭṭa juḍi mānyadā nirōpa . Adāgi .
yīta . na ceṁdapura gramadalli prajōtpatyasaṁ . da A
svija sudha 3 yellu yī gramada gauḍki svasti . yēnu
vuṁṭṭadhaṁnū ninage pālasikoṁḍihalli . yī ma
nyeda bhumiyoḷage (.) haḷasaru Ubida kāraṇadi
ṁda (.) holake (.) juḍiyekkasāle Aivaraṇeyillade da
ṇukoḷutēne (.) yiṁnnu vaṁdu nālkuvarahada kuḷa
vaṇada bhūmiyaṁnu (.) juḍi manyevāgi (.) pālisi
koḷabēku yībagye (.) siraṇige pavaṇe yiṁnuru va
rahaṁnnu koṭenu (.) juḍiyekkasāle tyettukoṁḍu (.) dē
vara sēveyale hājirāgi yidyēnu yeṁdu (.) nīnu hu
juru baṁdu hēḷikoṁḍali (.) na(ṁ)mma makkaḷu mari
yaṁbōdāriṁda cittakke taṁdu (.) ni(ṁ)nna vaṁdi
yiṁda siriṇigikāpilu maḍidduga 17 nal yī ho
ṁnna tyegedukoṁḍu yigramada kālasārtti bumiyo
ḷage yivasaṁ . dalli . yīgramada baṁṭara saṁbāḷakke
koṭadu Urabhaḷeyoḷalu (.) guḍugura girena saṁbaḷa
ke koṭudu taḷavārara bageyoḷalu sīḷa Ardhakke ku
ḷavaṇa ga 2¬8¬ yidanu baḷiyalli kāḷara nāraveya sa
ṁbaḷakke koṭa bagēdu (.) kāḷiyamana saṁbaḷakke ko ṭa sīḷu
Ardhakke kuḷuvaṇa ga 2¬ Aṁtu sīḷuve 1 kke kuḷuvāṇa
ga 4 ¬ da bhuminu (.) ninage juḍimāṁnya (.)
vāgi pālisikoṁḍu yidēvye yīsadara haṇa juḍi mā
nyakke (.) juḍi yekkasāleyanu mōkāru māḍi pāli
sikoṁḍa vivarau sālabādu Avana juḍiya
maḍi juḍisāhavāgi koḍuvadu ga 2l ya
kkasāle biddavaruṣa sālabādu koḍuva . juḍi
1 ho 9 ttu koḍuvadu yakkasāle ga 4 l
juḍiyaElle sāhā mōkāra maḍi pāllisikoṁḍu yidē
ve . yī pramaṇa tyetukoṁḍu niṁna putra pautra pārā
ṁba sukalli Anubhavisikoṁḍu yihōdu . vaṁda
re paṭi biddāggu ninage samaṁdhavillau .
Digital edition of SII 18.451 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
